events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON. The scenario is overcurrent device selection & coordination, photos show installed work following referenced detail, clearances labels supports terminations in place, inspection card no open correction note. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. The prompt asks evaluate described field condition. Given evidence says clearances labels supports and terminations are in place and follows detail, no open correction note. We have no conflicting info. References NEC 240, 210.8, 210.12, 110.14(C). We need output JSON with all fields. decision likely pass. risk low. work_stage rough-complete. component_conditions none -> empty list. percent_complete maybe 85? rough-complete. value no numeric reading -> 0. sound_source, event_time, rate, order empty defaults? Need include. workable empty. findings empty. actions empty. rationale brief. references list of code anchors. confidence 0.9? Provide raw JSON. Ensure no markdown fences.
